name: variance-review
description: Standard variance review — agent should call variance-review and group by flag, surfacing investigate-grade GLs first.
input_message: Run my May 2026 variance review — flag the GL accounts that need investigation.
expected_behavior: Calls variance-review (which uses sap_get_variance_analysis with no gl_code). Groups results by flag — investigate first, watch second, normal collapsed to a count. Includes signed % variance (e.g. +86.4%) and dollar variance. Suggests at least one drill-down (e.g. JE-30099 manual entry on GL 6200).
